objective: Genereer per rij één korte, klantgerichte Nederlandse upsell-zin. Maximaal 100 tekens (incl. spaties), B1-niveau, actief, in 'je krijgt'-stijl. Beschrijf alleen het voordeel van de aangeboden waarde — noem of vergelijk de vorige waarde NIET.

prompt_versions.note: Created an initial prompt with explicit field restrictions, a hard 100-character cap, and a strong ban on comparative phrasing to keep lines customer-centric and non-comparative.
Revised the prompt to ban spec parroting entirely, force 'Je krijgt', require concrete everyday use cases, and add a clearer premium tonality rule for top-tier rows.
Added explicit tier build-up and scenario ladders so stronger offers feel distinct, plus a mandatory worry-free top-tier tone and a ban on vague or awkward phrasing.
Tightened the prompt with explicit grammar rules, a stronger ban on jargon and vague wording, and a more concrete worry-free top-tier style to improve naturalness and premium feel.
